steps: Append a '# Coverage artifacts' comment section

description: Create codecov.yml with 90% project and patch coverage targets
steps: Set precision to 2 and round to 'down'
Add ignore list: tests/, crates/*/tests/, research/, specs/

description: Add coverage job to .github/workflows/ci.yml with nightly Rust and cargo-llvm-cov
steps: Add a new 'coverage' job alongside the existing 'ci' job
Set the job name to 'Coverage (90% branch gate)'
Add step: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly with components: llvm-tools-preview
Add step: 'cargo llvm-cov --no-report --workspace --branch' to run all tests with branch coverage
Add step: 'cargo llvm-cov --no-report --doc' to run doctests with branch coverage
Add step: 'cargo llvm-cov report --doctests --branch --lcov --output-path lcov.info' to generate lcov report
Add step: 'cargo llvm-cov report --doctests --branch --fail-under-branches 90' to enforce 90% threshold
Add step: codecov/codecov-action@v5 with 'if: always()', files: lcov.info, token from secrets, fail_ci_if_error: true
Ensure the existing 'ci' job is completely unchanged

description: Add mandatory coverage commands section to CLAUDE.md for LLM agents
steps: Add a new '## Coverage Commands (MANDATORY before pushing)' section after Build Commands
Document the correctness gate framing: LLM-generated code must hit 90% branch coverage
Add command: 'cargo +nightly llvm-cov --workspace --branch --html --open' for HTML reports
Add command: 'cargo +nightly llvm-cov --workspace --branch --lcov --output-path lcov.info' for editor gutters
Add toolchain prerequisites: rustup toolchain install nightly, rustup component add llvm-tools-preview, cargo install cargo-llvm-cov
